description: Support thread operations and AI draft data. Each row represents a support thread with customer request details, requirements flags, AI-generated draft reply, and processing status. Can be joined with ai_human_comparison for quality analysis.

columns.name: thread_id
columns.description: Primary key. Unique identifier for the support thread.

columns.name: ticket_id
columns.description: Associated support ticket identifier. NOT NULL.

columns.name: requires_reply
columns.description: Whether this thread requires a reply to the customer

columns.name: requires_editing
columns.description: Whether the AI draft needs editing

columns.name: requires_box_contents_info
columns.description: Whether box contents info is needed

columns.name: ai_draft_reply
columns.description: AI-generated draft response to the customer

columns.name: full_request
columns.description: Full text of the customer request

columns.name: prompt_version
columns.description: Prompt version used for AI draft generation

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: When the thread record was created (default: now()). NOT NULL.

columns.name: thread_date
columns.description: Original thread creation date from the ticketing system

columns.name: action_analysis
columns.description: JSON output from Action Analysis agent: requires_system_action, action_type, details. Stored as text (not JSONB).

columns.name: is_outstanding
columns.description: Whether this thread is flagged as outstanding/notable

use_cases: Support volume analysis (count threads by period)
AI draft coverage (% threads with ai_draft_reply)
Requirements analysis (which requires_* flags are most common)
data_quality_notes: Primary key is thread_id (varchar), not an auto-increment. action_analysis is stored as TEXT (not JSONB) — use JSON parsing functions if needed. Multiple boolean requires_* columns indicate what information is needed. status values vary — use introspect_schema to check current values. Can be joined with ai_human_comparison via thread_id for quality metrics.
